svg.title: Elephant conflict prevention system — 12-stage workflow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the complete closed-loop workflow of the patent: data acquisition, edge inference, contextual risk scoring, predictive forecasting, alert dissemination, response coordination, drone verification, IoT deterrence, blockchain logging, feedback retraining, hotspot analytics, and closed-loop operation.

g.text: RGB/IR cameras · microphone · vibration · env. sensors
Noise reduction · normalisation · on-device CNN detection
Stage 3 — Contextual analysis & ERI risk scoring
Terrain · time of day · weather · proximity · population density
CNN + LSTM + Transformer fusion → ERI: Low / Medium / High / Critical
LSTM / Transformer on GPS trails → future trajectory + conflict zones
Dynamic geo-fence computed from speed · risk · population density
GPS-based nearest officer assignment · real-time tracking · event closure
Autonomous deploy · RGB + thermal feed · AI cross-verification
Sound emitters · strobe lights · vibration poles in buffer zones
Every event timestamped · cryptographically signed · tamper-proof ledger
Citizen / officer confirm or reject · trust scoring engine
Heatmaps · seasonal migration trends · patrol optimisation
Detection → Risk → Prediction → Alert → Response → Verify → Deter → Log → Retrain
